mapper.select: select ifnull(SUM(c.amount),0) as totalAmount, ifnull(SUM(c.tonnage),0) as totalTonnage, ifnull(dh.delivered_amount,0) as deliveredAmount, ifnull(dh.delivered_tonnage,0) as deliveredTonnage, ifnull(SUM(c.amount),0) - ifnull(dh.delivered_amount,0) as remainAmount, ifnull(SUM(c.tonnage),0) - ifnull(dh.delivered_tonnage,0) as remainTonnage from jsh_contract c left join ( select dh.organ_id, SUM(ifnull(dh.discount_last_money,0)+ifnull(dh.other_money,0)-ifnull(dh.deposit,0)) as delivered_amount, SUM(ifnull(di_sum.w,0)) as delivered_tonnage from jsh_depot_head dh left join ( select header_id, SUM(ifnull(weight,0)) as w from jsh_depot_item where ifnull(delete_flag,'0')!='1' group by header_id ) di_sum on di_sum.header_id = dh.id where dh.type='出库' and dh.sub_type='销售' and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0')!='1' group by dh.organ_id ) dh on dh.organ_id = c.organ_id where ifnull(c.delete_flag,'0') != '1' and c.organ_id = #{organId} and c.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
